【原著向cp＋不会抢所有人高光＋不憋屈不黑所有人＋不完美主角但是有脑子】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc2bb319ee1f41bf2001a4b97cde3538b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"衣梨","author_id":"","book_id":"7529722350984498201","book_name":"综漫：女主她手握主角剧本","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d0c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1147人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529723674832683545","read_count":"1147","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"242211"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"105","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,系统,二次元,综漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a88012f9cf2bf91f4ce6904c6d3aa3da~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251967&x-signature=2eGwQjZQ5TfrvDk%2B03wfFPTygAs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3016655933541944","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"27"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321123926F5B9D93CC1B25CDCDAC7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3997,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":159},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1758816121,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7541274746102072088","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我只能说在这么多同人饭中，这篇是我看得很满意的了，看过其中一篇小樱会成为叛忍的：因为被大蛇丸当成实验体，内心变得麻木冰冷，重生在下一世之后，她对小7班的感情大打折扣，尤其是作者还在不断的描写她有“多么的理智冷静，手法身法多么的精确之类的，绝不是一个下忍能够做到，这孩子究竟经历了什么，眼神空洞，冷眼旁观，面对大反派有多么游刃有余”之类的话，这种饭让我难以下咽，又让我一个樱推心痛难忍。除了这个写的还行，剩下的穿越了夺舍小樱成为小樱的小说，让我更难受了。在我的书架里，这本书是目前唯一一本写小樱如此自然并且合理的塑造微改，樱妈表示欣喜若狂。作者大大真的不考虑单出一本写小樱的吗？有很大的续作空间啊[KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][我也强推][做鬼脸][做鬼脸][做鬼脸][做鬼脸][做鬼脸][做鬼脸][做鬼脸][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755843661,"group_id":"7529722350984498201","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"112567125016795"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529722350984498201","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9894,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7541266711446717208","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我是樱推，这篇文看的我贼溜舒服。小樱角色塑造得很成功，并且也弥补了不少的小遗憾（樱推和鸣推会喜欢的情节），并且本篇小樱还有里樱存在，相当于原文的成年樱的意识时不时的来盯着这个世界的小樱成长，这个世界的小樱与原文小樱的成长脱离了一些轨道，但也大差不差，本文小樱会刻苦的练习体术与内卷理论知识，比较理智而且可爱。她并没有跟井野因为追求佐助而关系破裂，也跟猪鹿蝶成为了很好的朋友，而且获得了木叶高层和老三代的一些关注。小樱心系木叶，在宇智波灭族警卫队紧缺的情况下做出了一些贡献，我想她未来成为木叶高层的路线已经很坚定了吧。我蛮喜欢的，大多数小遗憾都得到了圆满，感觉心里软软的。不时的会出现一些幽默的语言，剧情可以说贴原文且比较顺畅。必须五星好评啊，优秀写手[KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][KISS][我也强推]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755842963,"group_id":"7529722350984498201","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"魔怔摸头","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6sBDxXPA6EzBklTrJHgnh8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4461eab556474d808e69f40a80a48404~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620036&x-signature=EJs%2FKHMIXr1LxwIkCI50%2F3a9unI%3D","user_id":"112567125016795","user_name":"只望樱君心无阻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"112567125016795","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529722350984498201","book_info":{"abstract":"综漫，全女主阵容，非皮套文！原著感情线会有，年纪小的全是cb向。

er_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1755855223,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7538091345808425790","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我的妈呀，怎么写的这么好啊🥹🥹🥹，我一直很喜欢少年漫，我最中二的时候就是我看热血动漫的时候。我很喜欢作者大大塑造的樱酱，她是后期战力崩溃中的一股清流，凭一己之力站到了新一代医疗忍者的顶峰，聪明又强大。大大把樱酱描绘成了理想的样子，机灵又活泼俏皮，怎么这么好看啊！！！！[爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755103498,"group_id":"7529722350984498201","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无他，唯手闲耳，也罢也罢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwhAQl1di8xp7Om+is4xuulYlhPyNBFS5TnoPIVnTIP8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/282173a85a9146dd9fbc086d915bc20c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618298&x-signature=jo52S26blEZadoQq1liTQL24AJI%3D","user_id":"3789357809155691","user_name":"完整的鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3789357809155691","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529722350984498201","book_info":{"abstract":"综漫，全女主阵容，非皮套文！原著感情线会有，年纪小的全是cb向。
